creator: magik@roorback.net
text:
I can reproduce this bug only under poudriere. Currently I'm not sure if
this is problem with edje port or with poudriere.


When I call `make package` or `make install` in /usr/ports/graphics/edje
directory, everything goes correctly. File /usr/local/bin/edje_watch
exists in package and on filesystem and it is regular file.
